verification_protocol: A receipt may only leave pending/ in the SAME turn its expected_objects[*].result fields are written to 'pass'/'failed' with evidence AND executor_applied_version + approver are populated. Never move on structural apply alone.
summary: Forward-only repair migration reconciling live-vs-git apply-gaps found by inventorying the live catalog (MCP db_schema, 225 tables) against all git migrations. Fixes 5 gap groups where additive migrations never took effect live. Historical files were NOT edited or re-run.
convention_reference: docs/releases/production-release-convention.md + Database migration release contract (CLAUDE.md §'Database migration release contract')
executor_applied_version_note: Lovable applied 20260722170000 and recorded it as schema_migrations version 20260722182906 (committed file 20260722182904_1b6d807a-*.sql).

expected_objects.evidence: db_schema 2026-07-23: onboarding_applications.status → default "'in_progress'::text", nullable false. (Was 'pending' pre-repair — the outage-causing default.)

expected_objects.object: engagement_letters columns: status, signed_by, signer_name, signer_email, version, client_id, company_id
expected_objects.evidence: db_select engagement_letters returned all 7 columns; status backfilled to 'signed' on a signed row.

expected_objects.verified_by: executor (Lovable) — no catalog RPC for CHECK constraints available to claude
expected_objects.evidence: Lovable pg_constraint query returned 1 row for engagement_letters_status_check. Corroborated: migration applied (182906) and its guarded DO-block adds the constraint if absent.

expected_objects.object: function protect_engagement_letter_signatures() re-keyed off signed_at (not OLD.status)
expected_objects.evidence: mcp_list_functions definition_hash changed from pre-repair 15acc3aeb249a07654e622438d63f053 to post-repair f8389700eea7e2ec93f2dade8a59a53e — the CREATE OR REPLACE to the corrected body took effect.
db_select templates returned category + is_active; is_active value true confirming the default.
db_schema 2026-07-23: bank_transactions.updated_at → nullable false, default now().

preflight.gaps_confirmed_live_preapply: engagement_letters.status / invoices.paid_at / templates.category all errored as absent on db_select; bank_transactions had 0 NULL updated_at rows

superseded_note: 20260722160000_fix_onboarding_access_token_default.sql is a redundant idempotent duplicate of Lovable's applied 20260722174336 — governed by receipt 2026-07-22-governance-g1-g2-token.json.
verification_result: COMPLETE 2026-07-23: all 8 expected objects pass. Applied as 20260722182906. 7/8 verified independently by claude (db_schema/db_select/mcp_list_indexes/mcp_list_functions); B1-check verified by the executor's pg_constraint query (no catalog RPC for CHECK constraints available to claude).
